name: Plaza Strider
description: A long-legged civic bird that stalks the hub's market terraces, unbothered by crowds, snapping up dropped grain and stray coins it hoards in rooftop nests.
starting_behavior: Curious scavenger, follows players carrying food, flees only when cornered

name: Cistern Lurker
description: A pale amphibious thing that lives in the hub's old water cisterns, surfacing at dusk. Harmless unless its pool is disturbed, then territorial.
starting_behavior: Ambush guardian of water sources, retreats underwater when hurt

name: Lamplighter Moth
description: A hand-sized moth whose wing-scales glow with stored daylight. Hub children chase them at night; they cluster on the great plaza lanterns.
starting_behavior: Drifts toward light sources, swarms when threatened
